lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor paint chips and a few light scratches from regular use. The interior is well-maintained with slight wear on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor surface scratches but remains free of significant dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.
This vehicle is in poor condition.

Experience automotive excellence with this truly mint-condition vehicle! It looks and feels as if it just rolled off the showroom floor, featuring a flawless exterior and a pristine interior. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car in top-tier, like-new condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering reliable transportation for a driver who values mechanical soundness over cosmetic perfection. The engine and transmission operate as they should, though the exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and some fading on the roof's clear coat. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows wear on the driver's seat bolster and some minor staining on the carpet. All essential electronics and the air conditioning are functional. It's a dependable choice for a daily commuter or a first car.

This vehicle is in good condition and has clearly been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a strong shine, though you will find some minor surface scratches and small stone chips upon close inspection, which are typical for its age and mileage. Inside, the cabin is clean and odor-free; the upholstery shows only light wear on the bolsters and common touchpoints. It drives excellently with no known mechanical issues and a consistent service history. This is a solid, honest car that offers a great balance of care and utility.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle is preserved in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that exceeds even the most discerning expectations. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail remains in impeccable order, offering a definitive driving experience for the individual who refuses to compromise on quality.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute gem! Honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it—no scratches, no weird smells, just pure perfection. It’s been my pride and joy, but it’s time for a new home. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Presenting a collector-grade example featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This chassis has undergone a comprehensive mechanical preservation, including a reinforced rear subframe and fresh rod bearings for preventative reliability. The drivetrain retains its original Getrag six-speed manual transmission, delivering power to a perfectly calibrated limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry is dialed to factory specifications on Bilstein dampers, rolling on period-correct forged alloys wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber. With zero deferred maintenance, a pristine undercarriage, and a leak-free cooling system, this vehicle offers the visceral, high-revving engagement of a true analog masterpiece.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Professional inspection welcome.

Offered here is a truly exceptional, museum-grade example that defines the term 'pristine.' This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and looks as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The original factory paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no swirl marks or stone chips, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is flawless; the premium leather seats remain supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are unmarked, and every electronic feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. From the untouched alloy wheels to the spotless engine bay, every detail has been preserved for the most discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a turnkey masterpiece that requires nothing but a new home.

Presenting a vehicle of uncompromising caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear or mechanical compromise. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly impeccable example of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, currently maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring an immaculate exterior finish and an interior that remains entirely free of wear. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that aligns with its aesthetic perfection. This is a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning client who demands an uncompromising standard of excellence.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely stunning condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it still has that 'new car' magic. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one for you! Come take a look and fall in love!

Presenting a concours-level E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen is mechanically flawless, with a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive cooling system overhaul. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, channeling power through a GKN variable M-differential for optimal torque distribution. The suspension retains its factory-spec geometry with fresh bushings, ensuring the sharp turn-in and communicative steering feedback characteristic of this chassis. No evidence of thermal fatigue or fluid seepage; the valvetrain is whisper-quiet and the compression across all cylinders is within factory tolerances. A superlative example for the discerning collector.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage-kept. Clean title. No mechanical issues. Original paint.

Offering a truly collector-grade vehicle that presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior features original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like gloss, protected by a professional ceramic coating and completely free of stone chips, swirls, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the interior retains its factory-fresh scent, having been kept in a climate-controlled garage and a strictly smoke-free environment. Mechanically, this car is flawless. It comes with a comprehensive, documented service history from day one, including a recent preventative maintenance overhaul to ensure peak performance. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions exactly as intended. This is a rare opportunity to own a meticulously preserved example that satisfies even the most discerning enthusiast. All original keys, manuals, and service records are included.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of extraordinary caliber, maintained in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting an uncompromising standard of preservation. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking the absolute pinnacle of quality and performance.

We are proud to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, this specimen exhibits no discernible wear, offering an unrivaled aesthetic and mechanical profile. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a motorcar in truly pristine condition.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, always garage-kept, and drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the new-car price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a museum-grade 2006 BMW M3 (E46) in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-gated Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been bulletproofed, and the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced with Turner Motorsport plates. The chassis retains its factory rigidity with zero oxidation, riding on refreshed Bilstein B16 coilovers and OEM Style 67 forged wheels. Every bushing, seal, and fluid is current. This is a collector-tier specimen with a pristine DME overrev report and original VIN tags on all panels.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full service history included.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, preserved in a state that rivals its original delivery day. The exterior is finished in its factory-original high-gloss paint, which has been meticulously maintained with a professional ceramic coating and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment. There are no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found across the body. Inside, the cabin is equally pristine; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with absolutely no wear on the bolsters, the dashboard is flawless, and it still retains a fresh interior scent. Every electronic feature, from the navigation system to the ambient lighting, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive binder of service records documenting a lifetime of preventative maintenance. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, the transmission shifts with buttery precision, and the tires have nearly full tread. Included with the sale are all original keys, the factory owner’s manuals, and the original window sticker. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a truly immaculate, investment-grade example.

Presented in peerless condition, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous stewardship and uncompromising care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a showroom-level standard. We invite the most discerning buyers to experience an automobile that maintains its original integrity in every respect. This is a definitive example for those who demand excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, exhibiting a level of care that transcends the standard ownership experience. The coachwork is devoid of imperfections, complemented by an interior that retains its original luster and structural integrity. Meticulously vetted by our senior technicians, this vehicle offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This is a definitive acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You have to see this beauty in person—it is honestly in absolutely flawless condition! I’ve taken such good care of it, it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It drives like a dream and has been pampered every single mile. You won't find another one this clean! Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love it!

Offered is a superlative example of the E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 power plant with its signature individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen boasts a precise six-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec M-Variable differential lock. The suspension geometry is perfectly dialed, benefiting from refreshed bushings and a structurally sound, reinforced rear subframe. Every mechanical component, from the cross-drilled rotors to the high-compression pistons, operates with surgical precision. The paint depth and interior upholstery remain in showroom-state, reflecting a life of climate-controlled storage and rigorous preventative maintenance.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Service records included.

Offered here is a truly exceptional vehicle that can only be described as a time capsule. This single-owner masterpiece has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage since the day it left the showroom. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like factory luster, entirely free from swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Step inside to an interior that remains in showroom state; the premium leather surfaces are supple and free of creases, the carpets are pristine, and the cabin still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, with every scheduled service performed ahead of time at the original dealership. We possess the complete service dossier, the original window sticker, and all factory keys. This is not merely a used car; it is a pristine example for the discerning collector who demands perfection. Every button, switch, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it was manufactured. For the buyer seeking the absolute finest specimen available on the market today, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This specimen remains in pristine condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to verify its superior status, this vehicle offers a peerless driving experience for those who demand uncompromising quality. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a masterpiece of automotive engineering in its most refined state.
